prompt: Flat minimal macOS UI design mockup in the visual style of the Reporter app by Nicholas Felton: full-bleed solid color background filling the entire image edge to edge, one question per screen, large quiet grotesque sans-serif typography (like SF Pro), white and semi-transparent white text, no gradients, no drop shadows, no cards, no window chrome, no menu bar, no decoration, no illustration, no photographic elements, generous negative space. A precise flat UI screenshot. Solid cobalt blue (#1E4FD8) background. Tiny semi-transparent white caption 'cenno' top left, small close glyph top right. Large white question slightly above center: 'What are you working on?'. Below it a long thin white horizontal underline (a text input line) with dim placeholder text 'type or speak' resting on it; at the right end of the underline a small thin-outlined white circle containing a minimal white microphone glyph. Bottom right corner a small white text button 'Send'.
